title: MTV-7 Multi-Terrain Vehicle

The '''MTV-7 Multi-Terrain Vehicle''' was a single-track, double-[[wheel]]ed [[Groundcar/Legends|groundcar]] used by the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] to [[Scout/Legends|scout]] [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] terrain during the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The MTV-7, adaptable in multiple mobile configurations, was operated by a single [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and armed with a single [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]]. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] utilized MTV-7s among its ground [[Blizzard Force/Legends|forces]] as part of the Imperial invasion of [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Alliance High Command/Legends|headquarters]], during the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].

==Characteristics==
The MTV-7 Multi-Terrain Vehicle<ref name="Kenner" /> was a single-track [[Groundcar/Legends|groundcar]] with two large [[wheel]]s, each featuring grooved surface treading.<ref name="A Dark Time" /> In addition to the vehicle's basic upright position, the MTV-7's wheels could extend outward from the main body to adopt a low, ground-hugging configuration.<ref name="Kenner" /> Such versatility made the MTV-7 adaptable to many environments, and the vehicle was easier to deploy than the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transport]] [[Walker/Legends|walker]]. Armed with a single<ref name="A Dark Time" /> rotating [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]],<ref name="Kenner Catalog" /> the MTV-7 held room for a single [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in an open-[[Atmosphere/Legends|air]] [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]]—unlike [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bikes]], the MTV-7 did not require a pilot possessed of [[Death/Legends|suicidal]] tendencies.<ref name="A Dark Time" /> A forward-facing, grilled headlight was positioned at the front of the vehicle.<ref name="Kenner" />

==History==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] utilized the MTV-7 Multi-Terrain Vehicle among its ground forces.<ref name="A Dark Time" /> At least three MTV-7s participated in<ref name="Kenner" /> the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]],<ref name="A Dark Time" /> the massive Imperial campaign<ref name="CSWE-Battle of Hoth">{{CSWECite|II|62|Hoth, Battle of}}</ref> in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]<ref name="Date">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].</ref> to crush the [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Rebel Alliance High Command]] headquarters of [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Water/Legends|ice]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]].<ref name="Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> Both [[Cold assault stormtrooper|snowtroopers]] and [[Vehicle Command Crewer|Imperial Army pilots]] of the Empire's invasion [[Blizzard Force/Legends|force]] operated the MTV-7s<ref name="Kenner" /> to scout Hoth's hostile terrain.<ref name="Kenner Catalog" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|They crawl, they fly, they climb, they go just about anywhere! ''MTV-7'' is a ''MULTI-TERRAIN VEHICLE'' used by the Empire to scout the hostile ice planet, ''HOTH''. It carries one Action Figure. It has spring-loaded legs and a movable laser cannon.|1981 Kenner Toy Fair Catalog|<ref name="KennerCatalog">{{WebCite|url=http://theswca.com/index.php?action=disp_item&item_id=39671|text=MTV-7 (Multi-Terrain Vehicle)|author=Salvatore, Ron|work=[http://theswca.com/collectors.html The Star Wars Collectors Archive]|archivedate=20170923184448}}</ref>}}
[[File:MTV7Kenner.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Kenner's original MTV-7 Multi-Terrain Vehicle toy packaging]]
The MTV-7 Multi-Terrain Vehicle was an original creation of the [[Kenner Products|Kenner]] toy company as part of its [[1981]] [[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (toy line)|''Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back'']] [[Mini-Rigs]] vehicle series.<ref name="Kenner Catalog" /> The Mini-Rig vehicles, which did not appear in any of the three films of the ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[original trilogy]], were fairly inexpensive models designed to carry one character and thereby increase play value at a lower cost than Kenner's larger toy vehicles.<ref name="Action Figure Archive">''[[Star Wars: The Action Figure Archive]]''</ref>
